(` Crores) Particulars As at March 31, 2023 Less than 1 year More than 1 year Total Interest bearing borrowings 415.90 161.74 577.64 Trade Payables 2,511.16 - 2,511.16 Lease Liabilities 23.48 87.22 110.70 Other financial liabilities 37.42 - 37.42 Interest on borrowings 13.97 - 13.97 Total 3,001.93 248.96 3,250.89 45 CAPITAL MANAGEMENT The Group’s objective for capital management is to maximise shareholder wealth, safeguard business continuity and support the growth of the Group. The Group determines the capital management requirement based on annual operating plans and long term and other strategic investment plans. The funding requirements are met through optimum mix of borrowed and owned funds.
